---
title: "Release Gate Stack"
---

# Release Gate Stack

**Working seal:** `stack://release-gate-stack/5798FD1FC7`

**Enter:** Use when a change set is already built and the question is whether it is ready to ship.


## Related Runes

- [1073 canary](../reference/house-build-tooling-versioning-and-release.qmd#rune-1073) - A deliberately limited release whose job is to discover whether production reality agrees with the story told in staging.
- [1086 deploy](../reference/house-build-tooling-versioning-and-release.qmd#rune-1086) - The crossing from forge to world. Many good ideas become bad facts only after they are actually shipped.
- [1146 benchmark](../reference/house-testing-verification-and-observability.qmd#rune-1146) - A performance claim forced to meet measurement. Benchmarks are where speed rhetoric either cashes out or dies.
- [1180 observability](../reference/house-testing-verification-and-observability.qmd#rune-1180) - Enough internal evidence exists that you can infer what the system is doing from the outside. Not logs alone: legible state under pressure.
- [0943 rollback {DB}](../reference/house-databases-persistence-and-time-binding-words.qmd#rune-0943) - Permission to retreat toward a previously trusted state. A system without rollback mistakes hope for safety.


## Related Spell Templates and References

- [Bug Diagnosis From Logs](../spells/bug-diagnosis-from-logs.qmd)
- [Performance Tuning](../spells/performance-tuning.qmd)
- [Stack Grammar](../reference/stack-grammar.qmd)
- [Failure Modes](../reference/failure-modes.qmd)
- [Canon Map](../reference/canon-map.qmd)
| Step | Spell               | Artifact                                                     | Advance when                                      |
| ---- | ------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------ | ------------------------------------------------- |
| 1    | Assemble candidate  | Frozen release artifact and config                           | Candidate is exact                                |
| 2    | Quality gate        | Tests, static checks, scans, and prerequisites               | Quality gate is green                             |
| 3    | Stage deploy        | Staging or canary deployment                                 | Limited environment is live                       |
| 4    | Observe             | Metrics, logs, traces, dashboards, and critical-flow results | Signals remain green                              |
| 5    | Promote or rollback | Release decision                                             | Broad release happens only if guard remains green |

## On Fail

Rollback the candidate and open a repair stack instead of arguing from hope.

## Why It Works

It resists shipping by narrative alone.


## Dogfood Record

This repository uses the release-gate shape through the [Publish Quarto Site workflow](https://github.com/corbensorenson/software-grimoire/actions/workflows/publish.yml). The generated run record is stored at [examples/release-gate/release-gate-stack-run.json](https://github.com/corbensorenson/software-grimoire/blob/main/examples/release-gate/release-gate-stack-run.json).
